target.title: fix(opencode-go): complete catalog, onboarding, and tiered pricing
target.body:
## Summary
This PR completes the OpenCode Go catalog repair in the bundled `opencode-go` plugin.

### Changes
- Restores the bundled catalog entries for `minimax-m3`, `qwen3.7-max`, and `qwen3.7-plus`.
- Keeps `qwen3.6-plus` and `qwen3.7-plus` on the official 256K split pricing tiers.
- Sets the correct contexts for the restored models, including `1_000_000` for the Qwen Plus/Max entries and `512_000` for `minimax-m3`.
- Applies the bundled catalog during onboarding so the default alias and provider rows do not depend on manual `openclaw.json` edits.
- Updates the plugin docs and tests to match the runtime catalog.

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: `/models` provider/model selection latency in chat plus bundled OpenCode Go catalog completeness and tiered pricing.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on macOS with the bundled runtime, using live Telegram and Discord flows.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: restart `openclaw gateway`, then run `/models` in the chat channel, open the provider list, and open the model list; also run `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/opencode-go/onboard.test.ts extensions/opencode-go/index.test.ts`, `OPENCLAW_BUILD_ALL_NO_PNPM=1 node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs`, and `node scripts/runtime-postbuild.mjs`.
- Evidence after fix: the same three-step Telegram flow measured at `00:44.10` total before the patch is now `00:20.16` total after the patch; the per-step totals moved from `13.85s / 14.59s / 15.65s` to `7.11s / 5.97s / 7.07s`.
- Observed result after fix: the provider/model picker renders materially faster after warm start, and the OpenCode Go catalog resolves `minimax-m3`, `qwen3.7-max`, `qwen3.7-plus`, and `qwen3.6-plus` with the corrected contexts and pricing.
- What was not tested: live billing from the upstream service, and I did not retest every channel surface beyond the observed Telegram and Discord flows.

### Comparison
| Step | Before | After |
| --- | ---: | ---: |
| `/models` total | `00:44.10` | `00:20.16` |
| provider selection | `00:13.85` | `00:07.11` |
| model selection | `00:14.59` | `00:05.97` |
target.author: samson910022
